ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ring_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ring size */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* UK size of the ring */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size of the ring */,
  "eu_size" TEXT /* EU size of the ring */,
  "diameter_mm" REAL /* Diameter of the ring in millimeters */,
  "circumference_mm" REAL /* Circumference of the ring in millimeters */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material used for the ring */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ring style */,
  "thickness_mm" REAL /* Thickness of the ring in millimeters */,
  "weight_g" REAL /* Weight of the ring in grams */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the ring size details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ring size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of rings in stock */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the rings are stored */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material used for the ring */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ring style */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory details were last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the inventory to avoid stockouts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES ring_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the warehouse */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse manager */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the warehouse details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ring size sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of rings sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material used for the ring */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ring style */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the sale record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES ring_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "is_vip" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is a VIP */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the customer details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "open_date" TEXT /* Date when the store opened */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the store details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion */,
  "from_size_system" TEXT /* Sizing system to convert from */,
  "to_size_system" TEXT /* Sizing system to convert to */,
  "from_size" TEXT /* Size in the 'from' sizing system */,
  "to_size" TEXT /* Corresponding size in the 'to' sizing system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the conversion data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_to_size FOREIGN KEY ("to_size") REFERENCES ring_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_from_size FOREIGN KEY ("from_size") REFERENCES ring_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_popularity" (
  "popularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each popularity record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ring size */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the size is popular */,
  "sales_count" INTEGER /* Number of sales for the size in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the popularity data was last updated */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material used for the ring */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ring style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("popularity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_popularity_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES ring_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_demand" (
  "demand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demand prediction */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ring size */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for the demand prediction */,
  "predicted_demand" INTEGER /* Predicted demand for the size in the region */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date when the demand prediction was made */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material used for the ring */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ring style */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the demand prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_demand_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES ring_sizes ("size_id")
)
